1.description: get Trondheim municipality geometry and kommunenummer for spatial filtering and reporting

2.description: inspect distinct skredrisikokvikkleireklasse values in quick-clay release areas

3.description: get quick-clay release-area polygons (utlosningomr) with class and geometry

4.description: reduce quick-clay polygons to those intersecting Trondheim municipality

5.description: get parcels (teig) in Trondheim with area > 5000 m2

6.description: find parcels that intersect reduced quick-clay polygons

7.description: get counties (fylke) geometry and names for mapping municipality to county

8.description: find county polygon containing Trondheim municipality

9.description: attach county name to parcel results and prepare final sorting/limit

final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE lower(kommunenavn) ILIKE '%trondheim%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [kvikkleire]
SELECT DISTINCT skredrisikokvikkleireklasse FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.utlosningomr;
guard_error: {"executed": false, "error": "tool_validate_sql blocked.", "reason": "Step 1 is planned to query database 'kommuner', not 'kvikkleire'. Use the planned database for this step or produce a new plan with different step numbers.", "step": 1, "action": "query"}

1.description: get Trondheim municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: get county polygons to resolve county for Trondheim

3.description: find county that contains/overlaps Trondheim municipality

4.description: select quick-clay release areas with high risk class (inspect/filter by 'high' text)

5.description: reduce quick-clay areas to Trondheim extent by intersects with municipality geometry

6.description: select parcels in Trondheim with area > 5000 m2

7.description: find parcels that intersect the reduced quick-clay areas

8.description: collapse to one row per parcel and keep area and municipality

final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE lower(kommunenavn) ILIKE '%trondheim%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [fylker]
SELECT fylkesnummer, fylkesnavn, omrade
FROM fylker_a60155918c4a47c2b78f4ab52fc2bfa4.fylke
WHERE ST_Intersects(omrade, (SELECT omrade FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE lower(kommunenavn) ILIKE '%trondheim%'));
